reviews.comment:
Hace años que es lo mismo. Estaba por escribir al ACA, no hay para inflar las gomas, el bar carisimo y nunca está fresca la bebida y si uno quiere cafe para llevar el vaso no tiene tapa, hace años que esas cosas que describo no cambian, increíble y lo de la presión de las gomas, en un ACA, malísimo

(Translated by Google)
It's been the same for years. I was about to write to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), but there's no tire inflation service, the bar is ridiculously expensive and the drinks are never cold, and if you want a coffee to go, the cup doesn't have a lid. These things haven't changed in years, it's unbelievable. And the tire pressure issue at an ACA is just awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGa2JqMTlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar para descansar en medio del viaje. Las veces que fuimos no tenía panificación para acompañar café.

(Translated by Google)
A place to rest during a trip. The times we went, they didn't have any pastries to go with the coffee.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. El baño limpio con todos los servicios. Papel jabón secador de manos. Y vende nafta lo q necesitas. Sin restricción. Así deben ser todas las ypf

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. The bathroom is clean and has all the amenities: toilet paper, soap, and a hand dryer. And they sell as much gas as you need, without restrictions. That's how all YPF stations should be.
